ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price category of the property (e.g., cheap, medium, expensive) */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size category of the property (e.g., small, medium, big) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the property */,
  "air_pollution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the air pollution level near the property */,
  "noise_pollution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the noise pollution level near the property */,
  "water" INTEGER /* Availability of water utility */,
  "electricity" INTEGER /* Availability of electricity utility */,
  "heating" INTEGER /* Availability of heating utility */,
  "internet" INTEGER /* Availability of internet utility */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., house, apartment, commercial) */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "last_renovated" INTEGER /* Year the property was last renovated */,
  "garage" INTEGER /* Availability of a garage */,
  "garden" INTEGER /* Availability of a garden */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the property */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the property location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the property location */,
  "property_status" TEXT /* Current status of the property (e.g., for sale, for rent, sold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_air_pollution_id FOREIGN KEY ("air_pollution_id") REFERENCES air_pollution_levels ("air_pollution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_noise_pollution_id FOREIGN KEY ("noise_pollution_id") REFERENCES noise_pollution_levels ("noise_pollution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of the location (e.g., village, town, city) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or state where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the location */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "air_pollution_levels" (
  "air_pollution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each air pollution level */,
  "air_pollution_level" TEXT /* Level of air pollution (e.g., none, low, high) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the air pollution level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("air_pollution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "noise_pollution_levels" (
  "noise_pollution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each noise pollution level */,
  "noise_pollution_level" TEXT /* Level of noise pollution (e.g., none, low, medium, high) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the noise pollution level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("noise_pollution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "utilities" (
  "utility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each utility */,
  "utility_name" TEXT /* Name of the utility (e.g., water, electricity, heating, internet) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the utility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("utility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_utilities" (
  "property_utility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property-utility association */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "utility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the utility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_utility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_utilities_utility_id FOREIGN KEY ("utility_id") REFERENCES utilities ("utility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_utilities_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., property owner, agent, administrator) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property owner */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the property owner */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the property owner */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the property owner */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the owner record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_owners_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the agent */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the agent */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the agent record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agents_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "administrators" (
  "administrator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrator */,
  "administrator_name" TEXT /* Name of the administrator */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the administrator */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the administrator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the administrator record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("administrator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view event */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being viewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user viewing the property */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date when the property was viewed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user viewing the property */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_views_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_inquiries" (
  "inquiry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inquiry event */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being inquired about */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the inquiry */,
  "inquiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the inquiry was made */,
  "message" TEXT /* Inquiry message */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user making the inquiry */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the inquiry (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inquiry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_inquiries_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_inquiries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update event */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was made */,
  "update_message" TEXT /* Update message */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who made the update */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who made the update */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_updates_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision event */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being revised */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date when the revision was made */,
  "revision_message" TEXT /* Revision message */,
  "revised_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who made the revision */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who made the revision */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revisions_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the image was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_images_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., pool, gym, balcony) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the feature was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_features_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)
